title: Cloudy with Low Chance of Karuta

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All righty! Thanks to the school we have everything we need! Since
it's everyone's first time playing karuta, let's go over the rules.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Our variant involves two teams of four, but just like in regular karuta,
you listen for the first half of a poem, then take the card with the
second half on it!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So the only differences are the size of the cards... and that you have
to run to get them?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's right! We run, and sometimes clash... It's called the martial art
of the humanities for good reason!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Each team splits into "finders" and "takers." Basically, people who
look for the matching card, and those who go and get it.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Well, who better to give commands than yours truly? I, T.M.
Opera O, shall don the mantle of finder. Are you ready, Doto?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Y-yes! Th-that means I'm a taker. I-I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All right then, Urara, that leaves us to pair up. Think you're up to be a
finder?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okie dokie! I'll give it a shot!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure there are more rules, but I'm no expert either. So why
don't we learn by doing and give it a go!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
First things first, our reciter will be this nifty app... The conveniences
of modern life, am I right? Okay then...

text_block_list.name: Reciter App
text_block_list.text:
Springtime is now upon us, the blossoming plum declares...
Umamusume, go forth unto the finish—

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now off with you Doto, upon wings of gold! To the south, secondo da
destra!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wha? S-south? You mean this way? Or this way?! Oooh, wh-which
way is it?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hmm, so what am I supposed to be finding?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Urara! It's "Negishi's trodden turf heights"! Look for the one that starts
with "ne"!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ne... ne... Found it! Fuku, over there!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Where's there?! I've never heard more ambiguous directions!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, which way's south?! I th-th-think that side gets sunlight in the
morning, which means...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh no no, not Meisho "Doh"-to! Run straight or you'll crash into
someone!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? There's two "ne" cards. Hey, Fuku, which one do we want?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Bwoohh?! Urara, the one that goes "ne" then "gi"!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wait, "gi"? Then this is the wrong one... wh-whoa! M-my foot!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hyikes! Doto, this isn't the time to be practicing twirls! Waaah!

text_block_list.name: Doto & Fukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Owww!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Well, that was such a disaster I almost feel refreshed!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Nnghh... Sorry, if only I wasn't so clumsy...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Nonsense, Doto, it's not your fault! We're all beginners here, after all!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: But... if I didn't trip, I wouldn't have brought you down with me...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No worries, no worries. It's not like you did it on purpose, we all know
that.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Plus, did you forget already? Shiraoki foretold that if we join forces in
a competition, great, great fortune awaits!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Which means, if we all enter the karuta tournament together, then win
or lose, good fortune will be ours!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: B-but... can we really say we "joined forces" if all we do is show up?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Of course we can! Imagine the great Shiraoki telling amateurs like us
"You better win!" She would never.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
As long as we all take part and have fun, everyone goes home happy!
That's what she wanted to get across, if you ask me!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Th-that kind of makes sense...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Still, I shouldn't be tripping left and right. Wouldn't want anyone
getting hurt... I really need to practice...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now, now, wipe that worry off your face. Where smiles bloom, fortune
looms!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well, if I may... At times, a little rehearsal is in order! So as your
commander, allow me to ask you this...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
When you think "commander," does this strike you as a fitting pose?
Or perhaps this?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Whoa, so cool! I wanna try too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ooh, looking good! But why not take it a step further, like this?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(They're all so... motivated. Ohh, I need to practice so I don't screw
up...)
